headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 24, 2026**
article:
The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Ozzie Albies leading the charge at the plate. Albies hit a home run (5) on a fly ball to right center field and finished with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

Injuries and availability continue to impact MLB teams. Ryan Feltner has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right ulnar nerve inflammation. The Colorado Rockies right-hander joins a list of injured players that includes Dean Kremer (Baltimore Orioles), Robert Garcia (Texas Rangers), Francisco Lindor (New York Mets), Dylan Dodd (Atlanta Braves), Bryan Hoeing (San Diego Padres), Wyatt Langford (Texas Rangers), and Max Lazar (Philadelphia Phillies).

The Chicago Cubs have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Nicky Lopez, acquired from the Colorado Rockies in exchange for cash. Lopez joins the Cubs after being traded from the Rockies. Other notable trades include the Houston Astros trading RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake, the Los Angeles Dodgers trading RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott, and the New York Mets trading LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Braves Take Down Nationals 7-2**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Ozzie Albies leading the charge at the plate. Albies hit a home run (5) on a fly ball to right center field and finished with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Brewers in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Milwaukee Brewers 5-4 in a closely contested matchup. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 2 runs.

top_news.title: **Cubs Comeback Victory: Phillies Fall 7-8**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged out the Philadelphia Phillies 7-8 in a thrilling matchup. Brandon Marsh led the Phillies with 3 hits, including 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Rockies in Thrilling 10-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres secured a hard-fought win against the Colorado Rockies, outscoring them 10-8. Mickey Moniak led the Padres' offense with a standout performance, going 4-for-5 with two home runs and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies RHP Ryan Feltner Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Colorado Rockies right-hander Ryan Feltner has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right ulnar nerve inflammation.

top_news.title: **Cubs Acquire Nicky Lopez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Nicky Lopez, acquired from the Colorado Rockies in exchange for cash. Lopez joins the Cubs after being traded from the Rockies.
